ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the project (e.g., Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_domain FOREIGN KEY ("domain") REFERENCES project_domains ("domain_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Model parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "position" REAL /* Position metric for the evaluation */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency metric for the evaluation */,
  "entailment" REAL /* Entailment metric for the evaluation */,
  "distance_from_publisher_date" REAL /* Distance from the publication date metric for the evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metric_values" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the log entry is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the log entry is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
